author: Turkßon
title: Great app, Needs immediate fix
content: Updated my iPhone to iOS 18 and the app has been misbehaving since. Sound deteriorates badly when the phone lags just a bit, and does not go back to normal even after the phone has stopped lagging

author: Peppatron
title: Vim
content: Your is the best music app on iOS

title: Superb
content: Just what I was looking for
